Rebar Concrete Products – RCP TextBot

Legal Documents

Privacy Policy End-User License Agreement

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 18, 2026

1. Overview

Rebar Concrete Products ("we," "us," or "our") operates RCP TextBot, a business communication and order management tool. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our SMS-based ordering service.

2. Information We Collect

We collect the following information from users who interact with RCP TextBot:

  • Phone number (used to identify and communicate with you)
  • Name, email address, and company name (provided during account setup)
  • Order details, delivery addresses, and product preferences
  • SMS message content sent to our system
  • Images of construction plans submitted via MMS (used solely to generate material estimates)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use collected information exclusively to:

  • Process and fulfill orders for concrete and rebar products
  • Generate invoices and estimates in QuickBooks Online
  • Calculate delivery fees and schedule deliveries
  • Respond to construction-related questions via SMS
  • Notify you of order status and payment requests

We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

4. QuickBooks Integration

RCP TextBot integrates with Intuit QuickBooks Online to create invoices and estimates on your behalf. We access only the accounting data necessary to process your orders. We do not store your QuickBooks credentials. OAuth 2.0 tokens are used in accordance with Intuit's security standards.

5. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. All data is transmitted over HTTPS. Access to our systems is restricted to authorized personnel only.

6. Data Retention

We retain order and communication records for a period of 3 years to support warranty claims, billing disputes, and legal compliance. You may request deletion of your data by contacting us directly.

7. Your Rights

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us at maddoxconstruction1987@gmail.com.

8. Fraud Prevention

RCP TextBot is available to existing customers only. Phone numbers are verified against our customer records to prevent unauthorized access and fraud.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Continued use of our service constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

10. Contact Us

Rebar Concrete Products
2112 N Custer Rd, McKinney, TX 75071
Phone: 469-631-7730
Email: maddoxconstruction1987@gmail.com
